en: Don't fight someone like her in the first place.
If they haven't contributed the right amount of grain to the stores,
ko: 만약 그들이 창고에 필요한 곡물을 충분히 기여하지 않았다면,

en: then I'm afraid they'll have to make do with what they've brought. We can't...
ko: 가져온 것만으로 버텨야 할 거야. 우리는...

en: It's been a while since I trained.
I can go and find the master of arms to you, my lady.
He didn't beat the hound. You did.
ko: 개를 때린 건 그가 아니라, 너야.

en: I want to train with you.
You swore to serve both my mother's daughters, didn't you?
ko: 너는 내 어머니의 두 딸을 섬기겠다고 맹세했지, 그치?
